name: Gravekeeper's Shaman
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>墓</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>はか</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>守</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>もり</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>祈</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>祷</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>とう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>師</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Gains 200 DEF for each "Gravekeeper's" monster in your GY. Negate all monster effects that activate in the GY, except "Gravekeeper's" monsters. While "Necrovalley" is on the field, your opponent cannot activate Field Spell Cards, also Field Spell Cards cannot be destroyed by your opponent's card effects.
mnst_eff: Gains 200 DEF for each "Gravekeeper's" monster in your GY. Negate all monster effects that activate in the GY, except "Gravekeeper's" monsters. While "Necrovalley" is on the field, your opponent cannot activate Field Spell Cards, also Field Spell Cards cannot be destroyed by your opponent's card effects.
eff: Gains 200 DEF for each "Gravekeeper's" monster in your GY. Negate all monster effects that activate in the GY, except "Gravekeeper's" monsters. While "Necrovalley" is on the field, your opponent cannot activate Field Spell Cards, also Field Spell Cards cannot be destroyed by your opponent's card effects.

sets.set: Speed Duel Starter Decks: Destiny Masters

mst: Negates the effects of Effect Monsters
Prevents activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Cannot be destroyed by card effects
